The '''Almanian system''', or '''Almania system''', was a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] located within the [[Mortex sector/Legends|Mortex sector]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

{{System-stub}}
